---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Stalled Over Student Protests and Electoral Reforms"
date: 2026-07-21T15:58:59.568429+00:00
summary: "Opposition protests over NEET paper leaks and police action against students disrupt Parliament as the government prepares major electoral and judicial reforms"
run_time_ist: "9:28PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:28PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both Houses were adjourned repeatedly as the Opposition staged protests over the NEET paper leak and the police crackdown on the youth-led &#x27;Cockroach&#x27; movement, with Rahul Gandhi and other leaders demanding a formal discussion on the alleged brutality.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxOZ1JHSV8zUE4zRTA2dnBjcjZjMy1PU0dEZzE0VGlsUUtTVVhjaE1KTzU3QlluM0dFMURSdUtBOVo1UFNEWHBVYkc3WE1fd3o4VlZVeGYwWUxCdFVfQm9mbHhIMWYxMksyQno2a2tCVUVqSkhRbmVyQ2tNQTRxQWlZTXZRakdvVGhJR0VUcURtMXNFZGdYZjh1eXhiTGtVX0k0X0o4UV9relVsYVhfNV91dEFQZFQtZ1lFaFphenNQSEN0bGNVcnVhbVRyVQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxNZVE2d3ROdHo0cDZERm9hblBiZ2dzcjRFUVV2M05oTHdPS2tZT3VuSFVPSUUxU3JYb25kNHZaVmliNzVSWjMzMXkyeE0tZkJhVTFDdmllTVZrR1RQYlZ4YzhhZWN1UDFPTGtHTEFCYUJxSlZaNWFNcGFXRzdpUGVsUFhpX0tmTTR1aVRyZGE5WFRIMnU0OTQxRQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I26</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I28</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I29</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and electoral reforms:</strong> The Centre informed the Supreme Court that a Tribunal Reforms Bill is nearing completion, while Parliament prepares to debate legislation to increase the number of Supreme Court judges and potentially expand Lok Sabha seats to 850.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPX0dnSDZsSWNibXl5a2FPN1A2X1pPZkVDVWpHOTJjOW14SVRVUjFjVUpCZmNtSlJVbklWWFN4c1NfY1NSazNzYzU5UjBkZjVGb0ZsYl9QQjI2RTlQX0pWT0R6TVU0X0FzLWY1UFlweGw2OW0yZnZQamtFbXFENU80T2tDbWYzMHg1Q0xSZXkyNlk3aURpc05FSHhuYUJ6SkJjSlE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Shiv Sena leadership dispute:</strong> The Shiv Sena (UBT) has moved the Supreme Court to challenge the Lok Sabha Speaker’s decision to recognize the merger of rebel MPs with the Shinde-led faction.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>NEET controversy:</strong> Prime Minister Modi addressed NDA MPs, labeling the NEET paper leak a &quot;grave sin&quot; and asserting that strict action is being taken against those responsible, even as the Opposition continues to demand his resignation over the issue.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W16</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>UCC legislation:</strong> The Madhya Pradesh assembly passed a Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Bill despite vocal protests from Congress MLAs.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google._?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W13</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W11] Government Agress To Discuss NEET Paper Leak Issue In Parliament | Congress | BJP | CJP | News18 - News18</a> News18</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google._?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W12] Madhya Pradesh assembly passes UCC Bill amid protest by Congress - The Economic Times</a> The Economic Times</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W13] Madhya Pradesh assembly passes UCC Bill amid protest by Congress MLAs - Deccan Herald</a> Deccan Herald</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W14] DMK for delimitation? NDA eyes parliamentary, political gains as Stalin&#x27;s party signals support - Moneycontrol.com</a> Moneycontrol.com</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W15] NEET paper leak a ‘grave sin’, not a political issue but about India’s youth, PM Modi tells NDA MPs - ThePrint</a> ThePrint</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W16] &#x27;We stand with students&#x27;: PM Modi tells NDA MPs strict action taken against NEET paper leak accused - The New Indian Express</a> The New Indian Express</li>

</details>
</article>
